payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Flat, low-pile dark navy/black rectangular rug that fills the crop horizontally and is partially edge-cropped (top/bottom cut off); shows slight fading/wear and scattered speckling or dust, thin profile with no visible fringe; approximate distance from camera ~1.2 m.

message.content: {"label":"rug","short_description":"dark rectangular low-pile rug (edge-cropped)","long_description":"Flat, low-pile dark navy/black rectangular rug that fills the crop horizontally and is partially edge-cropped (top/bottom cut off); shows slight fading/wear and scattered speckling or dust, thin profile with no visible fringe; approximate distance from camera ~1.2 m.","attributes":["dark navy/black color","rectangular shape","low-pile/flat texture","edge-cropped/partial","worn/faded areas","scattered speckling/dust","thin profile","no fringe visible","full-width in crop"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
